title: [Duels Extension] Placeholders
description: An optimized version of the placeholders extension.
body:
## Note:

**This is a extension fork of the popular Placeholders for [Duels (fork)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/duelsreloaded).**

**You must install MVdWPlaceholderAPI or PlaceholderAPI to use the placeholders.**

**Match Placeholders will also work for spectators spectating the match!​**

## Fixes:
- **Fix running Placeholders on MC 1.21+**
- Added ability to build the plugin

**{duels_match_kit}** or **%duels_match_kit%:** Name of kit used in the match. Displays the own inventory rating if there is no kit used.

**{duels_match_arena}** or **%duels_match_arena%**: Name of the arena player is dueling in.

**{duels_match_bet}** or **%duels_match_bet%**: Bet set on the current match. Displays 0 if not set.

**{duels_match_duration}** or **%duels_match_duration%**: Duration of the ongoing duel.

**{duels_match_rating}** or **%duels_match_rating%**: Your rating for the kit used in the duel.

**{duels_match_opponent}** or **%duels_match_opponent%**: Name of your opponent.

**{duels_match_opponent_health}** or **%duels_match_opponent_health%**: Health of your opponent.

**{duels_match_opponent_rating}** or **%duels_match_opponent_rating%**: Opponent's rating for the kit used in the duel. Displays the own inventory rating of the opponent if there is no kit used.

**{duels_match_opponent_ping}** or **%duels_match_opponent_ping%**: Opponent's ping.

**{duels_rating_[kit name]}** or **%duels_rating_[kit name]%**: Your rating for the specified kit or - (dash) for own inventory rating. Exmaple: **{duels_rating_Gapple}**
